metadata.head: bcf6015fd3ab8679e469604ac65c59312edb072a
metadata.purpose: honesty and causal lifecycle audit; not win-rate, profit, SL, or TP optimization
metadata.method: closed-candle walk-forward replay mirroring Entry Watch level lock, source-close break priority, trigger-timeframe sweep, forecast gaps, and conversion state
metadata.coverage_note: FVG, Order Block, and swing-liquidity levels reconstructed from branch rules. Equal-liquidity and previous-day/week levels were excluded; defect counts are conservative lower bounds.

verdict: BELUM JUJUR UNTUK EKSEKUSI ENTRY LIVE

direction_forecast_authority.reason: Every entry direction remained equal to the active Direction Forecast.

sweep_vs_break_order.reason: Source-timeframe close break is evaluated before lower-timeframe sweep.

watch_before_entry.reason: M15 produced 2 entry events on the first evaluation of a newly selected level.

forecast_gap_reconciliation.reason: M15 observed 30 breaks while forecast was inactive; 25 levels later reappeared because only the latest candle was checked.

detector_membership.reason: M15 produced 13 entries from locked levels that were no longer in the active detector set.

single_entry_lifecycle.reason: M15 had 18 levels with repeated distinct sweep-entry events, adding 40 extra entries.

conversion_semantics.reason: FVG/OB/liquidity labels convert only after source close break, but converted levels have no expiry or full gap reconciliation.

closed_candle_lookahead.reason: No pre-availability trigger entry appeared in this replay, but the engine has no explicit guard requiring trigger candle start after level availability.

required_fixes_before_live_entry: Clear or reconcile previous Entry Watch state whenever Direction Forecast becomes inactive.
Scan every closed source candle since last evaluation before reactivating a locked or converted level.
Require at least one completed watch cycle before ENTRY_TRIGGERED; a level selected on the current trigger candle must remain PANTAU.
Reject locked levels that are no longer active in the current concept detector.
Persist one entry event per level lifecycle, or require a reset/re-arm rule before another entry.
Add expiry and invalidation rules for iFVG, Breaker Block, and Valid Break conversions.
Enforce trigger candle open time >= honest level availability close time.
